name: PannableVideo

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: Internal Event Manager. Should be sent to processEvent in the update

aliases.name: State
aliases.comment: Internal state of the element. Should be part of model
aliases.type: { coords : Coordinate, sz : Scale, previous : Coordinate, center : Coordinate, touches : List Touch, pinch : Bool, iden : Int, rangeX : Float, rangeY : Float }

aliases.name: VideoInfo
aliases.comment:
Represent the info of the video. This currently includes:

  - videoSrc : the source of the video
  - videoSize : the dimension of the video in pixel
  - minScale : minimum zoom scale
  - maxSCale : maximum zoom scale
aliases.type: { videoSrc : String, videoSize : ( Int, Int ), minScale : Float, maxScale : Float }

values.name: advancedPannableVideo
values.comment: More advanced video element if you want to style, or do something I can't think of
values.type: (Msg -> msg) -> State -> VideoInfo -> List (Attribute msg) -> List (Html msg) -> Html msg

values.name: initialState
values.comment: The initial state to be put into init

values.name: pannableVideo
values.comment: The zoomable, pannable video element. Look for State and VideoInfo below

values.name: processEvent
values.comment: Process Msg in the update function

values.name: simpleVideoInfo
values.comment:
Simple VideoInfo object.

Take in: source of the video -> size in px
